scripts.ci:local: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm db:generate && pnpm lint && pnpm build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm --filter @pumpapp/shared build && pnpm --filter web build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('apps','web','dist');const dest=path.join('apps','api','public');fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(src)){const s=path.join(src,e);const d=path.join(dest,e);fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true});}" && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.start:prod: pnpm build:deploy && NODE_ENV=production pnpm --filter api start
